description:
This quiz assesses practical knowledge of Node.js I/O, covering fundamental file system tasks, buffer handling, encoding, and advanced streaming techniques. It is moderately challenging, encouraging learners to apply best‑practice patterns for efficient data processing. The tone is supportive and encouraging, guiding users to gauge and deepen their Node.js I/O expertise.
Topics: Node.js file system (fs) operations, Buffers and data encoding, Streams (readable, writable, transform), Streaming best practices and performance
Audience: Developers and students with basic JavaScript experience who want to solidify or expand their Node.js I/O skills.
